_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: Recently, it was shown that a newly generated Postn-cre line drives cre expression specifically and exclusively in SCs. We first verified that this cre line effectively recombines the floxed stop codon in the Rosa26 locus
details: Drives cre expression specifically and exclusively in Schwann cells, effectively recombines floxed stop codon in Rosa26 locus
